revision.text:
'''戊午'''（つちのえうま、ぼご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて55番目で、前は[[丁巳]]、次は[[己未]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（火生土）である。
==戊午の年==
==戊午の日== ===[[選日]]=== 戊午の日は[[八専]]の間日である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:戊午]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''戊午'''（つちのえうま、ぼどのうま、ぼご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの55番目で、前は[[丁巳]]、次は[[己未]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[午]]は陽の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（火生土）である。
==戊午の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って58が余る年が戊午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊午の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[58年]] *[[118年]] *[[178年]] *[[238年]] *[[298年]] *[[358年]] *[[418年]] *[[478年]] *[[538年]] *[[598年]] *[[658年]] *[[718年]] *[[778年]] *[[838年]] *[[898年]] *[[958年]] | *[[1018年]] *[[1078年]] *[[1138年]] *[[1198年]] *[[1258年]] *[[1318年]] *[[1378年]] *[[1438年]] *[[1498年]] *[[1558年]] *[[1618年]] *[[1678年]] *[[1738年]] *[[1798年]] *[[1858年]] *[[1918年]] *[[1978年]] | *[[2038年]] *[[2098年]] *[[2158年]] *[[2218年]] *[[2278年]] *[[2338年]] *[[2398年]] *[[2458年]] *[[2518年]] *[[2578年]] *[[2638年]] *[[2698年]] *[[2758年]] *[[2818年]] *[[2878年]] *[[2938年]] *[[2998年]] |}
==戊午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[5月]]が戊午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊午の日== 戊午の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 戊午の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのえうま}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:戊午]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:戊午]]

{{干支}} '''戊午'''（つちのえうま、ぼどのうま、ぼご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの55番目で、前は[[丁巳]]、次は[[己未]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[午]]は陽の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（火生土）である。
==戊午の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って58が余る年が戊午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊午の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[58年]] *[[118年]] *[[178年]] *[[238年]] *[[298年]] *[[358年]] *[[418年]] *[[478年]] *[[538年]] *[[598年]] *[[658年]] *[[718年]] *[[778年]] *[[838年]] *[[898年]] *[[958年]] | *[[1018年]] *[[1078年]] *[[1138年]] *[[1198年]] *[[1258年]] *[[1318年]] *[[1378年]] *[[1438年]] *[[1498年]] *[[1558年]] *[[1618年]] *[[1678年]] *[[1738年]] *[[1798年]] *[[1858年]] *[[1918年]] *[[1978年]] | *[[2038年]] *[[2098年]] *[[2158年]] *[[2218年]] *[[2278年]] *[[2338年]] *[[2398年]] *[[2458年]] *[[2518年]] *[[2578年]] *[[2638年]] *[[2698年]] *[[2758年]] *[[2818年]] *[[2878年]] *[[2938年]] *[[2998年]] |}
==戊午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[5月]]が戊午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊午の日== 戊午の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 戊午の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのえうま}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Horse-qq]] [[Category:戊午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:fixing the kk issue]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Horse-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:戊午]]

{{干支}} '''戊午'''（つちのえうま、ぼどのうま、ぼご）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの55番目で、前は[[丁巳]]、次は[[己未]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[午]]は陽の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（火生土）である。
==戊午の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って58が余る年が戊午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊午の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[58年]] *[[118年]] *[[178年]] *[[238年]] *[[298年]] *[[358年]] *[[418年]] *[[478年]] *[[538年]] *[[598年]] *[[658年]] *[[718年]] *[[778年]] *[[838年]] *[[898年]] *[[958年]] | *[[1018年]] *[[1078年]] *[[1138年]] *[[1198年]] *[[1258年]] *[[1318年]] *[[1378年]] *[[1438年]] *[[1498年]] *[[1558年]] *[[1618年]] *[[1678年]] *[[1738年]] *[[1798年]] *[[1858年]] *[[1918年]] *[[1978年]] | *[[2038年]] *[[2098年]] *[[2158年]] *[[2218年]] *[[2278年]] *[[2338年]] *[[2398年]] *[[2458年]] *[[2518年]] *[[2578年]] *[[2638年]] *[[2698年]] *[[2758年]] *[[2818年]] *[[2878年]] *[[2938年]] *[[2998年]] |}
==戊午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[5月]]が戊午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊午の日== 戊午の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 戊午の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのえうま}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Horse-qq]] [[Category:戊午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊午]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:fixing the kk issue]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Horse-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:戊午]]

==戊午の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って58が余る年が戊午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊午の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[58年]] *[[118年]] *[[178年]] *[[238年]] *[[298年]] *[[358年]] *[[418年]] *[[478年]] *[[538年]] *[[598年]] *[[658年]] *[[718年]] *[[778年]] *[[838年]] *[[898年]] *[[958年]] | *[[1018年]] *[[1078年]] *[[1138年]] *[[1198年]] *[[1258年]] *[[1318年]] *[[1378年]] *[[1438年]] *[[1498年]] *[[1558年]] *[[1618年]] *[[1678年]] *[[1738年]] *[[1798年]] *[[1858年]] *[[1918年]] *[[1978年]] | *[[2038年]] *[[2098年]] *[[2158年]] *[[2218年]] *[[2278年]] *[[2338年]] *[[2398年]] *[[2458年]] *[[2518年]] *[[2578年]] *[[2638年]] *[[2698年]] *[[2758年]] *[[2818年]] *[[2878年]] *[[2938年]] *[[2998年]] |}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Horse|kanji=戊午|romaji=tsuchinoe uma|onyomi=bogo|p=wùwǔ|w=wu-wu|mi=u⁵⁵ u²¹|y=mou6 ng5|j=mou6 ng5|ci=mɐu ŋo|mc=məu ŋo|oc-bs=mə ŋaʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Earth Horse also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 戊午'''（つちのえうま、ぼどのうま、ぼご）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの55番目で、前は[[丁巳]]、次は[[己未]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[午]]は陽の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（火生土）である。

==戊午の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って58が余る年が戊午の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊午の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[58年]] *[[118年]] *[[178年]] *[[238年]] *[[298年]] *[[358年]] *[[418年]] *[[478年]] *[[538年]] *[[598年]] *[[658年]] *[[718年]] *[[778年]] *[[838年]] *[[898年]] *[[958年]] | *[[1018年]] *[[1078年]] *[[1138年]] *[[1198年]] *[[1258年]] *[[1318年]] *[[1378年]] *[[1438年]] *[[1498年]] *[[1558年]] *[[1618年]] *[[1678年]] *[[1738年]] *[[1798年]] *[[1858年]] *[[1918年]] *[[1978年]] | *[[2038年]] *[[2098年]] *[[2158年]] *[[2218年]] *[[2278年]] *[[2338年]] *[[2398年]] *[[2458年]] *[[2518年]] *[[2578年]] *[[2638年]] *[[2698年]] *[[2758年]] *[[2818年]] *[[2878年]] *[[2938年]] *[[2998年]] |}
==戊午の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[5月]]が戊午の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[芒種]]から[[小暑]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊午の日== 戊午の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 戊午の日は[[八専]]の間日である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのえうま}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Horse (戊午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: bogo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth link invalid}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, i.e. Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Horse (戊午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: bogo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ
<!-- == * Yang Earth Horse (戊午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえうま (tsuchinoe-uma) ***Onyomi: ぼかのうま (boka-no-uma) ***Onyomi: ぼご (bogo) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): muo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Horse== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 58 when divided by 60 is a year of Bokugo ([[:en:Year|year]]). {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Bokugo (戊午の年)''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, i.e. Fire generates Earth).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Horse (戊午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: bogo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ
<!-- == * Yang Earth Horse (戊午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえうま (tsuchinoe-uma) ***Onyomi: ぼかのうま (boka-no-uma) ***Onyomi: ぼご (bogo) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): muo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Horse== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 58 when divided by 60 is a year of Bokugo ([[:en:Year|year]]). {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Bokugo (戊午の年)''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Horse (戊午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma ***Onyomi 1: bogo ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ
<!-- == * Yang Earth Horse (戊午) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 ng5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのえうま (tsuchinoe-uma) ***Onyomi: ぼかのうま (boka-no-uma) ***Onyomi: ぼご (bogo) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): muo ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Horse== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 58 when divided by 60 is a year of Bokugo ([[:en:Year|year]]). {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Bokugo (戊午の年)''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} ==Months of Yang Earth Horse== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:May|May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Horse== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Horse|kanji=戊午|romaji=tsuchinoe uma|onyomi=bogo|p=wùwǔ|w=wu-wu|mi=u⁵⁵ u²¹|y=mou6 ng5|j=mou6 ng5|ci=mɐu ŋo|mc=məu ŋo|oc-bs=mə ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr Generation|ja|相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, i.e. Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Horse (戊午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma
***Onyomi 1: bogo
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ

==Years of Yang Earth Horse==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 58 when divided by 60 is a year of Bokugo ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year}}).

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe ==Years of Yang Earth Horse==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 58 when divided by 60 is a year of Bokugo ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year}}).

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
