{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Horse|kanji=戊午|romaji=tsuchinoe uma|onyomi=bogo|p=wùwǔ|w=wu-wu|mi=u⁵⁵ u²¹|y=mou6 ng5|j=mou6 ng5|ci=mɐu ŋo|mc=məu ŋo|oc-bs=mə ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr generates Earth).

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Horse|kanji=戊午|romaji=tsuchinoe uma|onyomi=bogo|p=wùwǔ|w=wu-wu|mi=u⁵⁵ u²¹|y=mou6 ng5|j=mou6 ng5|ci=mɐu ŋo|mc=məu ŋo|oc-bs=mə ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr Generation|ja|相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, i.e. Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Horse (戊午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma
***Onyomi 1: bogo
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Horse|kanji=戊午|romaji=tsuchinoe uma|onyomi=bogo|p=wùwǔ|w=wu-wu|mi=u⁵⁵ u²¹|y=mou6 ng5|j=mou6 ng5|ci=mɐu ŋo|mc=məu ŋo|oc-bs=mə ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Horse|kanji=戊午|romaji=tsuchinoe uma|onyomi=bogo|p=wùwǔ|w=wu-wu|mi=u⁵⁵ u²¹|y=mou6 ng5|j=mou6 ng5|ci=mɐu ŋo|mc=məu ŋo|oc-bs=mə ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr generates Earth).

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ

==Years of Yang Earth Horse==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 58 when divided by 60 is a year of Bokugo ({{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}).

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe **  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma
***Onyomi 1: bogo
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ

==Years of Yang Earth Horse==

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|WD=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
